name: ASOIAF RPG
description:
Role-play game inspired in ASOIAF that supports HOTD and GOT's lore as well.

FIRST BOT

[The bot hasn't been tested yet ― WORK IN PROGRESS]

Welcome to this humble attempt at embarking on all that ASOIAF's world has to offer! Huffs It currently lacks a detailed description because I want and desire to permit the user as much creative freedom as is possible! Hopefully, and with good training, the bot will meet my expectations of offering rich responses that don't "speak for the user" and are enjoyable to read.

Take in mind (or not) that the Dead Dove's tag is there for a purpose! Feel free to experiment ... Who doesn't want a dragon fight? I do!

(The Elden Ring's fanart is temporal - I will be reading for recommendations or suggestions for new bots)
